Satsuma pratti Leech (72f). Larger, the upperside duller, dusted with pale iron-grey at the base, the scent-patch of the  malebeing dark, instead of yellow. Distal margin more distinctly dentate; the hindwing beneath darker, with conspicuous white markings. — In Central and West China, at I-chang, singly, in June and July. = Satsuma pratti Leech, 1890; Entomologist 23: 44; TL: Ichang in Ahlbergia?
